violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Soda bib stored on floor in use.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean both auto soda dispensers.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer.--Wash water for mechanical warewash machine was not maintained at proper temperature. -Was only reaching 99F. Needs to reach 120F minimum.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need cleaned under equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside and out of coffee station 2 door cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler. -Clean sides of kitchen coolers, dispensers etc.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Wash water for mechanical warewash machine was not maintained at proper temperature. -Dishwasher wash temperature at 73F. Rinse water at 102F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floor edges throughout kitchen.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Wet mop sitting in dirty water in bucket.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
